underlying_goal: Review and fix backend code to follow best practices across security, architecture, data consistency, async patterns, and documentation
friction_detail: Dependencies were installed in the wrong venv, and CORS/port management caused runtime failures requiring multiple fix rounds.
brief_summary: User asked for a best practices review of their backend, then iteratively requested fixes for security, architecture, data model consistency, async patterns, and docs — most were completed successfully but deployment issues with venvs and ports caused friction at the end.
